errors.resolution: The error indicates that the build system or runtime environment expects a specific file path (`plugin-manager.cpp`) which does not exist on disk. Instead of debugging the dependency chain, the immediate fix was to use FileWrite to create the required artifact. This pattern suggests that if a read operation fails with ENOENT, check if the preceding steps in the build/setup process are responsible for generating or copying the file; if so, explicitly run the generation step (or write placeholder
